name: delete_object
description: Delete an object from an R2 bucket by its key. Uses the S3-compatible DELETE endpoint. The operation is idempotent: deleting a non-existent object returns success without error.

parameters.name: bucket_name
parameters.description: The name of the R2 bucket containing the object.

parameters.name: object_key
parameters.description: The key (path) of the object to delete within the bucket.

body._note: No content returned on successful deletion.
